title: Chella Magale Song Lyrics Tamil & English Meaning | Jana Nayagan

sections.intro: The soul-stirring melody Chella Magale from the movie Jananayagan is a beautiful tribute to the bond between a parent and daughter. With its gentle orchestration and evocative lyrics, this track stands out as an emotional masterpiece. Explore the deep poetic layers of this lullaby-style anthem below.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • The phrase 'Kodi nilavugal' (ten million moons) is a classical Tamil poetic exaggeration used to describe divine beauty, repurposed here for paternal/maternal love.
  • The music video's soft lighting and intimate framing mirror the 'Lullaby' (Thalattu) genre of Tamil cinema, emphasizing the protective nature of the protagonist.
  • The line 'Ulagathukkae kadhavadaippom' (We will shut the door to the world) hints at a plot point in Jananayagan where the parent and child are isolated or on the run.

stanzas:
Kodi nilavugal varum azhaghae
Kodi kavidhaigal tharum porulae
Kodi varamellamae oru pillaiyanadhen
Siru siru sirippellamae
ennai vazha cholludhe

Kannae maniyae kannimaiyae
En kaikulla malarndhavalae
Enthan nenjil kudiyirukkum
Naani naadha en uyirae

Unna neengaadhu ennoda kaalgal
Unna kondaada undaana tholgal
Siru vizhiyaal kadha kadhaya nee pesa venum
Ulagathukkae kadhavadaippom neeyum naanum
Keikkaamale unakkunnu thara uyir irukkudhu

Kannae maniyae kanneimaiyae
En kaikulla malarndhavalae
Enthan nenjil kudiyirukkum
Naani naadha en uyirae

Needhaane enakellamae
En chella magalae
Kanne maniye kannimaiye
En kaikulla malarndhavalae

Frequently Asked Questions

What does 'Naani naadha' mean in the song?

It is a poetic variation referring to a 'pure sound' or 'primordial vibration,' signifying that the child is the fundamental harmony of the parent's life.

Is Chella Magale a sad song?

No, it is an uplifting and emotional melody celebrating the joy of parenthood, though it carries a deeply protective and sentimental tone.
tamilStanzas:
கோடி நிலவுகள் வரும் அழகே
கோடி கவிதைகள் தரும் பொருளே
கோடி வரமெல்லாமே ஒரு பிள்ளையானதேன் 
சிறு சிறு சிரிப்பெல்லாமே என்னை வாழச் சொல்லுதே

கண்ணே மணியே கண்ணிமையே
என் கைக்குள்ள மலர்ந்தவளே
எந்தன் நெஞ்சில் குடியிருக்கும்
நாணி நாத என் உயிரே

உன்ன நீங்காது என்னோட கால்கள்
உன்ன கொண்டாட உண்டான தோள்கள்
சிறு விழியால் கதை கதையாய் நீ பேச வேணும்
உலகத்துக்கே கதவடைப்போம் நீயும் நானும்
கேட்காமலே உனக்குன்னுதர  உயிர் இருக்குது

கண்ணே மணியே கண்ணிமையே
என் கைக்குள்ள மலர்ந்தவளே
எந்தன் நெஞ்சில் குடியிருக்கும்
நாணி நாத என் உயிரே

நீதானே எனக்கெல்லாமே
என் செல்ல மகளே
கண்ணே மணியே கண்ணிமையே
என் கைக்குள்ள மலர்ந்தவளே
englishStanzas:
Kodi nilavugal varum azhaghae
Kodi kavidhaigal tharum porulae
Kodi varamellamae oru pillaiyanadhen
Siru siru sirippellamae
ennai vazha cholludhe

[Oh beauty, you are the glow of ten million moons. You are the essence of ten million poems. It feels as if ten million boons have taken the form of one child; your tiny smiles tell me to keep living.]

Kannae maniyae kannimaiyae
En kaikulla malarndhavalae
Enthan nenjil kudiyirukkum
Naani naadha en uyirae

[My dear eye, my precious gem, my very eyelid! You are the one who blossomed within my arms. Living deep within my heart, you are my life’s purest sound.]

Needhaane enakellamae
En chella magalae

[You are everything to me, my darling daughter.]

Unna neengaadhu ennoda kaalgal
Unna kondaada undaana tholgal
Siru vizhiyaal kadha kadhaya nee pesa venum
Ulagathukkae kadhavadaippom neeyum naanum
Keikkaamale unakkunnu thara uyir irukkudhu

[My feet will never leave your side; my shoulders were made just to celebrate (carry) you. You must speak stories upon stories with your tiny eyes. You and I shall shut the door to the rest of the world; I have a life ready to give you, even without you asking.]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Chella Magale'?

The song conveys deep affection and admiration, celebrating love and the beauty of relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Jana Nayagan'?

The song is a romantic number that highlights the protagonist's feelings towards his beloved, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Vijay and composed by Anirudh.

When was 'Chella Magale' released?

The song was released in 2025.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chella Magale, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, creating a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song's melody, crafted by Anirudh, complements Vijay's soulful singing, making it a perfect addition to any celebration of love. The lyrics beautifully articulate the joy and warmth of affection, evoking feelings of happiness and nostalgia. Overall, this track is a celebration of love, making it ideal for weddings and special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chella Magale is a delightful romantic track that beautifully showcases Vijay's captivating vocals paired with Anirudh's enchanting music. The song radiates happiness and love, making it perfect for special occasions. Dive into the melodious world of Jana Nayagan and feel the emotions unfold!
stanzaMeanings: The beautiful flags of the moon will come, bringing lovely poems. Without any gifts, I am just a little boy. The small smiles are telling me to live.
Oh my dear, my precious one, you are the flower in my hands. You live in my heart, you are my life.
You are everything to me, my dear little girl.
Oh my dear, my precious one, you are the flower in my hands.
You are not just my feet, you are my strength. With your small eyes, you need to tell stories. Together, you and I will open the door to the world. Without asking, you give me life.
Oh my dear, my precious one, you are the flower in my hands. You live in my heart, you are my life.
You are everything to me, my dear little girl. Oh my dear, my precious one, you are the flower in my hands.
